name: wled-usermod-sensors-i2c
description: Combined I2C environmental sensor usermod for the common 3-in-1 breakout (HTU21D temp/humidity, BMP180 pressure, BH1750FVI lux) with optional MQTT / Home Assistant publishing. For ambient-light brightness control see the companion wled-usermod-auto-brightness.
keywords: wled, usermod, sensors, i2c, htu21d, bmp180, bh1750, temperature, humidity, pressure, lux, mqtt, home assistant, esp32
